articles.author: Kristin Kurens
articles.title: A Federal Study Linked Light Drinking to Cancer and Early Death. The Latest Guidelines Left It Out. - Money Talks News
articles.description: The government commissioned the research, so why aren’t Americans seeing it?
articles.content:
Even light drinking raises the risk of cancer, heart disease and early death, according to a federal study the government left out of its latest dietary advice.
